basic_details.job_title: Oil India Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Limited is recruiting 04 Retainer Doctors on contractual basis for immediate engagement at Duliajan.

age_limit.details: (As on the date of registration for Walk-in-Interview)

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: MBBS with minimum one year internship. Registration: Valid Certificate of Registration from MCI/SMC as mandated under Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Nationality: Only Indian Nationals.

salary_details.details: ₹85,000/- per month (includes Fixed and Variable components). No other allowances mentioned.

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview of total 100 marks. Minimum qualifying marks: 50 for all categories. Assessment parameters: Professional Knowledge & Skills
and Soft Skills. Final selection on merit basis.
how_to_apply: Report at the venue for Registration between 07:00 AM to 09:00 AM on 03/08/2026.
Carry all required original documents and self-attested copies.
Appear for the Walk-in-Interview on the same day.
No online application or application fee is required.
Venue: Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Oil India Limited, Duliajan, Assam.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regularization. Selected candidates must join immediately. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Mobile phones and electronic devices are strictly prohibited at the venue. Beware of fraudulent job offers.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Oil India Limited is recruiting 04 Retainer Doctors on contractual basis for immediate engagement at Duliajan.

rows.oil_india_limited_oil: Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Oil India Limited, Duliajan, Assam

content_sections.heading: OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
OIL Retainer Doctor Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: PwBD Suitability: OA, OL, OAL, Dw

content_sections.heading: OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: MBBS with minimum one year internship. Registration: Valid Certificate of Registration from MCI/SMC as mandated under Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Nationality: Only Indian Nationals.

content_sections.heading: OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: (As on the date of registration for Walk-in-Interview)

content_sections.heading: Contract Emoluments
content_sections.text: ₹85,000/- per month (includes Fixed and Variable components). No other allowances mentioned.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in-Interview of total 100 marks. Minimum qualifying marks: 50 for all categories. Assessment parameters: Professional Knowledge & Skills, Personal Attributes, and Soft Skills. Final selection on merit basis.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Walk-in-Interview
content_sections.text: Candidates must bring Original + Self-attested copies of: Filled Personal Bio-Data Form Recent passport size photograph Photo ID & Address Proof Class 10th certificate (DoB proof) MBBS Marksheets, Pass Certificate & Internship Certificate MCI/SMC Registration Certificate Caste / EWS / PwBD Certificate (if applicable) No Objection Certificate (if employed) Experience certificates (if any)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Report at the venue for Registration between 07:00 AM to 09:00 AM on 03/08/2026. Carry all required original documents and self-attested copies. Appear for the Walk-in-Interview on the same day. No online application or application fee is required. Venue: Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Oil India Limited, Duliajan, Assam.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for OIL Retainer Doctor Candidates
content_sections.text: Engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regularization. Selected candidates must join immediately. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Mobile phones and electronic devices are strictly prohibited at the venue. Beware of fraudulent job offers.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 04 vacancies of Retainer Doctor on Contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date for OIL Duliajan Retainer Doctor Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Registration and Interview will be held on 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Retainer Doctor in Oil India Limited?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments of ₹85,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for OIL Retainer Doctor post?
faq.answer: MBBS degree with minimum one year internship and valid MCI/SMC registration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for General category candidates?
faq.answer: Maximum 45 years as on the date of registration.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for OIL Retainer Doctor Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q7. When and where is the walk-in interview for OIL Duliajan Doctor posts?
faq.answer: On 03/08/2026 at Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Duliajan, Assam.

faq.question: Q8. What is the period of contractual engagement in OIL?
faq.answer: Initial period of 1 year, extendable up to maximum 2 years.

faq.question: Q9. Are PwBD candidates eligible for OIL Retainer Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Yes, suitable for OA, OL, OAL, Dw categories as per reservation policy.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for Oil India Limited Retainer Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must attend Walk-in-Interview with all original documents on the scheduled date.
